tweaks.name: Disable Auto-Restart After Updates
tweaks.description: Prevents Windows from auto-restarting after updates without user consent

tweaks.name: Disable Consumer Features
tweaks.description: Disables suggested apps and consumer experience features

tweaks.name: Disable Lock Screen Ads
tweaks.description: Removes ads and suggestions from the lock screen

tweaks.name: Show File Extensions
tweaks.description: Shows file extensions in File Explorer

tweaks.name: Disable Startup Programs Delay
tweaks.description: Removes the startup delay for applications

tweaks.name: Password Never Expires
tweaks.description: Sets Local Security Policy max password age to 0 (reflected in gpedit) and marks all enabled local accounts as never expire
tweaks.apply_cmd: Set-LocalSecPolicy MaximumPasswordAge 0; Get-LocalUser | Where-Object {$_.Enabled} | ForEach-Object { Set-LocalUser -Name $_.Name -PasswordNeverExpires $true -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
tweaks.rollback_cmd: Set-LocalSecPolicy MaximumPasswordAge 42; Get-LocalUser | Where-Object {$_.Enabled} | ForEach-Object { Set-LocalUser -Name $_.Name -PasswordNeverExpires $false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }

tweaks.name: Account Lockout Disabled
tweaks.description: Sets Local Security Policy lockout threshold to 0 (reflected in gpedit) - accounts never lock on failed password attempts from network or local logon

tweaks.name: Power - Display and Disk Never Off
tweaks.description: Sets monitor and hard disk timeouts to Never on both AC and battery power
tweaks.apply_cmd: powercfg /change monitor-timeout-ac 0; powercfg /change monitor-timeout-dc 0; powercfg /change disk-timeout-ac 0; powercfg /change disk-timeout-dc 0
tweaks.rollback_cmd: powercfg /change monitor-timeout-ac 15; powercfg /change monitor-timeout-dc 5; powercfg /change disk-timeout-ac 20; powercfg /change disk-timeout-dc 10

tweaks.name: Lid Close - Do Nothing
tweaks.description: Lid close action set to Do Nothing on both AC and battery - no sleep, hibernate, or shutdown on lid close
tweaks.apply_cmd: powercfg /setacvalueindex SCHEME_CURRENT SUB_SLEEP LIDACTION 0; powercfg /setdcvalueindex SCHEME_CURRENT SUB_SLEEP LIDACTION 0; powercfg /setactive SCHEME_CURRENT
tweaks.rollback_cmd: powercfg /setacvalueindex SCHEME_CURRENT SUB_SLEEP LIDACTION 1; powercfg /setdcvalueindex SCHEME_CURRENT SUB_SLEEP LIDACTION 1; powercfg /setactive SCHEME_CURRENT

tweaks.name: Delivery Optimization - LAN Only
tweaks.description: Windows Update delivery optimization peers with local network devices only - no internet peer sharing

tweaks.name: This PC Icon on Desktop
tweaks.description: Shows This PC icon on the desktop (via Themes desktop icon settings) - takes effect after sign out or Explorer restart
